# terrible_cisco_mso_ndo_l3out_interface_group_policy (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `bfd` (String) The Bidirectional Forwarding Detection (BFD) configuration. Providing an empty dictionary will remove the `bfd={}` from the L3Out Interface Group Policy.
- `bfd_multi_hop` (String) The Bidirectional Forwarding Detection (BFD) multi-hop configuration. Providing an empty dictionary will remove the `bfd_multi_hop={}` from the L3Out Interface Group Policy.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `custom_qos_policy` (String) The Custom QoS Policy configuration. Providing an empty dictionary will remove the `custom_qos_policy={}` from L3Out Interface Group Policy.
- `custom_qos_policy_uuid` (String) The UUID of the Custom QoS Policy. Providing an empty string will remove the `custom_qos_policy_uuid=""` from L3Out Interface Group Policy.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `description` (String) The description of the L3Out Interface Group Policy.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `interface_routing_policy` (String) The configuration of the Interface Routing Policy. Providing an empty dictionary will remove the `interface_routing_policy={}` from L3Out Interface Group Policy.
- `interface_routing_policy_uuid` (String) The UUID of the L3Out Interface Routing Policy. Providing an empty string will remove the `interface_routing_policy_uuid=""` from L3Out Interface Group Policy.
- `l3out` (String) The name of the L3Out. This parameter or `l3out_uuid` is required.
- `l3out_uuid` (String) The UUID of the L3Out. This parameter or `l3out` is required.
- `name` (String) The name of the L3Out Interface Group Policy.
- `ospf` (String) The Open Shortest Path First (OSPF) configuration. Providing an empty dictionary will remove the `ospf={}` from the L3Out Interface Group Policy.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `qos_priority` (String) The QoS priority level.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) Determines the desired state of the resource. Use `absent` to remove the resource. Use `query` to list the resource. Use `present` to create or update the resource.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `template` (String) The name of the template. The template must be an L3Out template. This parameter or `template_id` is required.
- `template_id` (String) The ID of the L3Out template. This parameter or `template` is required.
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
